title: Create with unlimited generations using Google Gemini 3 (Nano Banana Pro) in Adobe Firefly

author.name: Ariana Flores
author.bio: Ariana explores practical generative AI workflows for multidisciplinary creative teams.

excerpt: Explore how Gemini 3 integration in Adobe Firefly unlocks unlimited high-speed generations for ideation, concepting, and iterative creative workflows.

content.text: Unlimited experimentation in Firefly
Adobe Firefly now leverages Gemini 3 to support significantly expanded generation limits, enabling creators to test more concepts without workflow interruptions.
This allows teams to rapidly iterate on visuals, experiment with multiple directions, and refine outputs faster during brainstorming and production phases.

content.alt: Adobe Firefly interface showcasing unlimited AI image generations powered by Gemini 3

content.text: What this means for creators
With fewer generation constraints, designers can explore broader creative possibilities, compare alternatives side by side, and accelerate approval cycles.

title: Our view on Agentic AI: AI assistants that work for you, in your favorite apps

author.name: Malik Thompson
author.bio: Malik focuses on human-centered AI assistants across creative and productivity products.

excerpt: Learn how agentic AI assistants are evolving beyond chatbots to perform multi-step tasks directly inside the apps creators already use.

content.text: The next evolution of AI assistance
Agentic AI introduces assistants capable of understanding intent, taking actions, and completing workflows across integrated applications.
Rather than simply responding to prompts, these systems help automate repetitive tasks and proactively assist with creative and operational work.

content.alt: Conceptual visualization of agentic AI assistants working across creative applications

content.text: Why it matters
Embedding AI directly into familiar tools reduces context switching and helps teams complete more work with less manual overhead.

title: Adobe Firefly expands video and image creation with new AI capabilities and custom models

author.name: Priya Raman
author.bio: Priya leads roadmap initiatives for video, imaging, and enterprise-safe model innovation.

excerpt: Discover Adobe Firefly’s latest AI-powered video, image, and custom model enhancements built for scalable enterprise-grade content production.

content.text: Expanded generative capabilities
Adobe Firefly now supports enhanced AI-powered generation across both image and video workflows, with improved controls and fidelity.
Custom models also allow organizations to train generation systems on brand-safe assets for more consistent enterprise output.

content.alt: Adobe Firefly AI tools generating video and image content with custom model controls

content.text: Enterprise creative impact
These upgrades make it easier for teams to scale personalized, branded content across multiple campaigns and formats.

title: Get your creative team on the same page with Frame.io, now available on Adobe.com

author.name: Noah Bennett
author.bio: Noah helps creative organizations streamline review and approval pipelines at scale.

excerpt: See how Frame.io’s availability on Adobe.com makes collaborative review, approval, and production workflows more accessible to teams.

content.text: Collaboration meets accessibility
Frame.io’s Adobe.com integration simplifies onboarding and access for teams managing review and feedback workflows.
Creative stakeholders can collaborate faster with centralized feedback, timestamped comments, and streamlined approval pipelines.

content.alt: Creative team collaborating through Frame.io review and approval dashboard

content.text: Improving team efficiency
By reducing fragmented communication, teams can move projects from draft to delivery with greater speed and clarity.

title: Discover and perfect great content with Adobe Stock's new site

author.name: Elena Park
author.bio: Elena researches content sourcing patterns and creative reuse across global teams.

excerpt: Explore Adobe Stock’s redesigned platform built to improve discovery, curation, and refinement of premium creative assets.

content.text: A better content discovery experience
Adobe Stock’s redesigned website introduces improved search, filtering, and browsing capabilities for asset discovery.
Creators can now find, preview, and refine stock content more efficiently across images, templates, and motion assets.

content.alt: Adobe Stock redesigned interface highlighting improved asset discovery tools

content.text: Faster sourcing for campaigns
Improved discovery tools help teams reduce sourcing time and maintain consistency across brand assets.

title: More control, less friction in texturing workflows: The latest Substance 3D innovations

author.name: Luca Moretti
author.bio: Luca advises studios on texture pipelines, material systems, and 3D production efficiency.

excerpt: Discover the newest Substance 3D updates designed to streamline texturing pipelines and enhance creative precision in 3D production.

content.text: Smarter 3D texturing workflows
Latest Substance 3D enhancements improve material editing, texture control, and procedural workflow flexibility.
Artists can now iterate faster while maintaining granular control over texture detail and asset consistency.

content.alt: 3D artist editing textures using latest Adobe Substance 3D workflow tools

content.text: Production-ready improvements
These upgrades reduce repetitive manual adjustments and improve throughput for 3D content teams.

title: How creators are leveraging Adobe's 2026 Creative Trends

author.name: Sofia Diaz
author.bio: Sofia translates macro cultural signals into practical guidance for creators and brands.

excerpt: Understand how modern creators are applying Adobe’s 2026 Creative Trends to shape campaigns, content, and audience engagement.

content.text: The rise of trend-driven creativity
Adobe’s 2026 Creative Trends reveal how creators are adapting to shifting audience expectations and cultural signals.
Brands and individuals alike are leveraging these trends to produce more resonant, relevant, and engaging creative work.

content.alt: Creative professionals applying Adobe 2026 design and branding trends

content.text: Applying trends strategically
Teams can use trend insights to guide campaign themes, design direction, and storytelling decisions.

title: How to shape the future with type, tech, and creative thinking

author.name: Ethan Cole
author.bio: Ethan writes about typography, interface systems, and emerging design technologies.

excerpt: Explore how typography, emerging technologies, and innovative design thinking combine to influence the future of creative work.

content.text: Where design meets innovation
Typography and emerging technologies continue to reshape how creators build experiences and communicate visually.
Creative thinkers who combine technical fluency with design fundamentals are best positioned to lead future innovation.

content.alt: Typography and digital design concepts representing future-focused creative thinking

content.text: Preparing for tomorrow
Investing in design systems, experimentation, and technical literacy helps teams stay ahead of creative shifts.

title: Building a side hustle or creative passion? Check out the new Adobe MAX Creator Track

author.name: Ariana Flores
author.bio: Ariana explores practical generative AI workflows for multidisciplinary creative teams.

excerpt: Learn how Adobe MAX’s new Creator Track helps aspiring creatives build side hustles, monetize skills, and grow their personal brand.

content.text: Designed for emerging creators
The Adobe MAX Creator Track introduces sessions tailored for freelancers, side hustlers, and creators building independent careers.
Topics include monetization, branding, audience growth, and practical strategies for turning passion into business.

content.alt: Adobe MAX Creator Track session for freelancers and aspiring creative entrepreneurs

content.text: Career-building opportunities
The track offers valuable insights for creators looking to scale freelance work or launch sustainable creative ventures.

title: Meet the new generation of creative luminaries at Adobe MAX

author.name: Malik Thompson
author.bio: Malik focuses on human-centered AI assistants across creative and productivity products.

excerpt: Meet the rising creative leaders and breakthrough talent being spotlighted at this year’s Adobe MAX event.

content.text: Celebrating emerging creative talent
Adobe MAX highlights a new generation of creators making waves across design, motion, digital art, and storytelling.
Attendees can explore their work, hear their stories, and learn from the innovative processes behind standout projects.

content.alt: Featured emerging creators and speakers showcased at Adobe MAX

content.text: Why it inspires the community
Showcasing fresh talent helps inspire the wider creative community and spotlights the future of the industry.
